payload.answer: In Admin SQL select-only mode, memory_cards can be read (SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10) but cannot be deleted (DELETE FROM memory_cards denied). No memory cards were created or removed in this operation.

entity_resolution.reason: no memory_entities affected by the current SQL limit/delete permissions scenario

details: Read operations permitted: SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10
Mutating operations denied: DELETE FROM memory_cards
